title: litsea glutinosa var. normalis
intro: Litsea glutinosa var. normalis, also known as the Burmese cinnamon or Chinese cinnamon, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its essential oil and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Litsea glutinosa var. normalis include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a spice, added to teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
